decisions.what: Replaced placeholder README with comprehensive project documentation
decisions.why: Specification 001 explicitly required a complete project README covering features, tech stack, setup, env vars, project structure, deployment, and license. Existing file had only a one-line description.

decisions.what: Used package.json and .env.example as authoritative sources for versions and env var details
decisions.why: Tech stack versions (React 18, Vite 5, Tailwind 3) and the VITE_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID variable description were drawn directly from the project files to keep the README accurate.

decisions.what: Documented project structure based on available_imports listing
decisions.why: The directory tree (layout/sections/ui/providers, config, hooks) reflects the components actually present in src/, ensuring the README matches reality.
